scripts.dev: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-daemon -p godly-mcp -p godly-notify -p godly-remote && bash ../scripts/cargo-whisper.sh && cd .. && vite
scripts.dev:watch: cd src-tauri && cargo watch -w daemon/src -w protocol/src -w mcp/src -w notify/src -w remote/src -w whisper/src -x "build -p godly-daemon -p godly-mcp -p godly-notify -p godly-remote" -s "bash ../scripts/cargo-whisper.sh"
scripts.dev:whisper: cd src-tauri && cargo watch -w whisper/src -w protocol/src -s "bash ../scripts/cargo-whisper.sh"
scripts.dev:test: cross-env GODLY_INSTANCE=test npx tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.test.json
scripts.build:daemon: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-daemon
scripts.build:daemon:release: npm run unlock -- --release && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-daemon --release
scripts.build:mcp: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-mcp
scripts.build:mcp:release: npm run unlock -- --release && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-mcp --release && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('plugin/bin',{recursive:true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('src-tauri/target/release/godly-mcp.exe','plugin/bin/godly-mcp.exe');"
scripts.build:notify: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-notify
scripts.build:notify:release: npm run unlock -- --release && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-notify --release
scripts.build:remote: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-remote
scripts.build:remote:release: npm run unlock -- --release && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-remote --release
scripts.build:whisper: npm run unlock && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-whisper --features cuda
scripts.build:whisper:release: npm run unlock -- --release && cd src-tauri && cargo build -p godly-whisper --features cuda --release
scripts.test:rust:fast: cd src-tauri && cargo nextest run --workspace --profile fast
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:rust && npm run test:e2e
